_comment: Resource (bus) policy for the central EventBridge bus `portal-aws-health` in dp-tooling (444455556666, eu-west-1). Allows ANY principal that belongs to the IskayPet AWS Organization (o-8u43vqg0jh) to PutEvents into the bus. Using aws:PrincipalOrgID avoids enumerating the 22 account IDs and auto-covers future accounts. Applied with: aws events put-permission --event-bus-name portal-aws-health --policy file://ops/aws-health-bus-policy.json (the --policy form REPLACES the whole policy, so it is idempotent).
